channel.title: How To Live Your Autonomous Life
channel.description: Weekly conversations between Noah and Ellis about autonomy, conscious choice, and living the life you actually want.
channel.itunes:author: FlamingoTales
channel.itunes:keywords: autonomy, conscious choice, personal development, self-directed living, life design, decision-making

item.title: Did You Choose This?
item.description:
Noah and Ellis explore a fundamental question: How much of your life did you actually choose? They discuss the difference between making choices and choosing the framework those choices live in — the menu vs restaurant problem. Ellis shares her journey from following a default path to consciously questioning and redesigning her life. A conversation about autonomy, defaults, and what it really means to choose.
Key moments: • The question that started it all (0:00) • Meet Ellis (0:33) • The menu vs the restaurant (1:58) • Looking at your actual options (4:21) • Conscious choice vs the default path (6:04) • Pick one thing. Look at it. (9:27)
Full episode & transcript: https://flamingotales.github.io/how-to-live-your-autonomous-life/episodes/S01E01_did-you-choose-this/
item.itunes:title: Did You Choose This?
item.itunes:summary: Noah and Ellis explore a fundamental question: How much of your life did you actually choose? They discuss the difference between making choices and choosing the framework those choices live in — the menu vs restaurant problem. Ellis shares her journey from following a default path to consciously questioning and redesigning her life. A conversation about autonomy, defaults, and what it really means to choose.
item.itunes:keywords: autonomy, choice, conscious living, defaults, decision-making, personal agency, self-directed life, financial independence
